Publish.LongDescription: This is the experimental branch of Platter mod for Cities: Skylines 2. You can expect to find new features and improvements here before they are added to the stable release. Please note that this branch may contain bugs or unfinished features, so use it at your own risk.
Publish.ChangeLog:
# Version 1.5.0
**New parcel sizes** - Added Narrow (1 cell wide) parcels - Added Extra-Wide (7,8 cells wide) parcels
**Snapping improvements** - Revamped snapping and added snap support for start and end of line tool - Refactored the way snapping injects itself into the base game - Improved logic and tweaked parameters for various snapping options, especially when multiple options are used together. - Improved the way platter let's the base game know a snap has occurred, which for example should remove the "rotation" options from view when snapped.
**Notable Bug Fixes** - Fixed: Unzoned parcel cells would be "eaten" by the vanilla grid in some cases - Fixed: Game would crash when drawing roads in some cases - Fixed: Parcels would connect to unzoned RoadBuilder roads, causing issues - Fixed: Relocate and Picker would not work correctly when used with Parcels - Fixed: Parcels would cause some buildings to lose props and trees when growing - Fixed: Zone indexes would get out of sync when adding or removing zones between save loads, causing incorrect parcel colors and prezoning behavior
**Other notable improvements** - Improved the building count tooltip accuracy and clarity - Adds keyboard-based controls for parcel sizes - Adjusted look and feel of the parcel overlay - More reliably detect corner lots when placing parcels - Improve handling of vanilla bulldoze and select - Significantly improved performance of the parcel overlay - Improved performance when caching and delivering data to the UI, especially for the pre-zone panel - Improved the way the road connection icon is added and removed - Improved performance of internal prefab selection mechanisms by caching references to important prefabs in memory - Numerous performance improvements to core systems/queries - Updated translations - Added a colored outline to unzoned Platter cells to distinguish them from vanilla unzoned cells - Fixed version mismatch between PDXMods version and binary version, which caused some confusion and issues with mod updates.
